'''dhobathaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:arachnogenic|arachnogenic]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-b-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:arachnogenic|arachnogenic]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| dhobathaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhobathithi|dhobathithi]] || [[word:dhobathiji|dhobathiji]] || [[word:dhobathishi|dhobathishi]] || [[word:dhobathiki|dhobathiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhobathuthuthu|dhobathuthuthu]] || [[word:dhobathujuju|dhobathujuju]] || [[word:dhobathushushu|dhobathushushu]] || [[word:dhobathukuku|dhobathukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhobathuthu|dhobathuthu]] || [[word:dhobathuju|dhobathuju]] || [[word:dhobathushu|dhobathushu]] || [[word:dhobathuku|dhobathuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhobathufthuf|dhobathufthuf]] || [[word:dhobathufjuf|dhobathufjuf]] || [[word:dhobathufshuf|dhobathufshuf]] || [[word:dhobathufkuf|dhobathufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhobathethe|dhobathethe]] || [[word:dhobatheje|dhobatheje]] || [[word:dhobatheshe|dhobatheshe]] || [[word:dhobatheke|dhobatheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhobathothotho|dhobathothotho]] || [[word:dhobathojojo|dhobathojojo]] || [[word:dhobathoshosho|dhobathoshosho]] || [[word:dhobathokoko|dhobathokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhobathotho|dhobathotho]] || [[word:dhobathojo|dhobathojo]] || [[word:dhobathosho|dhobathosho]] || [[word:dhobathoko|dhobathoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhobathofthof|dhobathofthof]] || [[word:dhobathofjof|dhobathofjof]] || [[word:dhobathofshof|dhobathofshof]] || [[word:dhobathofkof|dhobathofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhobathĂŻfthĂŻf|dhobathĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dhobathĂŻfjĂŻf|dhobathĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dhobathĂŻfshĂŻf|dhobathĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dhobathĂŻfkĂŻf|dhobathĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhobathĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|dhobathĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dhobathĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|dhobathĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dhobathĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|dhobathĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dhobathĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|dhobathĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhobathĂŻfthĂŻf|dhobathĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dhobathĂŻfjĂŻf|dhobathĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dhobathĂŻfshĂŻf|dhobathĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dhobathĂŻfkĂŻf|dhobathĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhobathĂŻfthĂŻf|dhobathĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dhobathĂŻfjĂŻf|dhobathĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dhobathĂŻfshĂŻf|dhobathĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dhobathĂŻfkĂŻf|dhobathĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhobathĂŠthĂŠ|dhobathĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:dhobathĂŠjĂŠ|dhobathĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:dhobathĂŠshĂŠ|dhobathĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:dhobathĂŠkĂŠ|dhobathĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhobathathatha|dhobathathatha]] || [[word:dhobathajaja|dhobathajaja]] || [[word:dhobathashasha|dhobathashasha]] || [[word:dhobathakaka|dhobathakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhobathatha|dhobathatha]] || [[word:dhobathaja|dhobathaja]] || [[word:dhobathasha|dhobathasha]] || [[word:dhobathaka|dhobathaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhobathafthaf|dhobathafthaf]] || [[word:dhobathafjaf|dhobathafjaf]] || [[word:dhobathafshaf|dhobathafshaf]] || [[word:dhobathafkaf|dhobathafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:dhobathasha|dhobathasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:dhobathshĂ«sha|dhobathshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhobathrosha|dhobathrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhobathmusha|dhobathmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhobathyasha|dhobathyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhobathnkshĂ«sha|godhobathnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhobathnkrosha|godhobathnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhobathnkmusha|godhobathnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godhobathnkyasha|godhobathnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:dhobabathasha|dhobabathasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dhobabathshĂ«sha|dhobabathshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhobabathrosha|dhobabathrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhobabathmusha|dhobabathmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhobabathyasha|dhobabathyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhobabathnkshĂ«sha|godhobabathnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhobabathnkrosha|godhobabathnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhobabathnkmusha|godhobabathnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godhobabathnkyasha|godhobabathnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:dhebĂŠthasha|dhebĂŠthasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dhebĂŠthshĂ«sha|dhebĂŠthshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhebĂŠthrosha|dhebĂŠthrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhebĂŠthmusha|dhebĂŠthmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhebĂŠthyasha|dhebĂŠthyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhebĂŠthnkshĂ«sha|godhebĂŠthnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhebĂŠthnkrosha|godhebĂŠthnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhebĂŠthnkmusha|godhebĂŠthnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godhebĂŠthnkyasha|godhebĂŠthnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:dhobfathasha|dhobfathasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dhobfathshĂ«sha|dhobfathshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhobfathrosha|dhobfathrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhobfathmusha|dhobfathmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhobfathyasha|dhobfathyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhobfathnkshĂ«sha|godhobfathnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhobfathnkrosha|godhobfathnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhobfathnkmusha|godhobfathnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godhobfathnkyasha|godhobfathnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a27364f}}
